raw_consumer_statement:
American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX NY XXXX XXXX : Claim Notice Discrepancy in Billing Address ACCOUNTS- XXXX, XXXX, XXXX AND XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Dear American Express XXXX XXXX I am writing to address a discrepancy regarding the name on the billing address associated with my American Express account XXXX As per the terms and conditions outlined in our agreement, I am hereby providing you with a claim notice to rectify this matter. 
Claim Description : Upon reviewing my billing statement, I noticed that the name on the billing address differs from the account name, which is represented in all capital letters. This inconsistency raises concerns regarding the accuracy and integrity of my account information. 
Specific Relief Demanded : * Immediate correction of the billing address to reflect the accurate name associated with the account in all capital letters and the lowercase letter name.

* Assurance that future billing statements and correspondence name will accurately reflect the account and correspondence letters to prevent any confusion or discrepancies. 
Notice Information : * Name : XXXX XXXX XXXX human benefactor to XXXX XXXX ACCOUNT HOLDER. 
* Address : XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, NC XXXX * Phone Number : XXXX * Last 4 of Account : XXXX I understand the importance of maintaining accurate account information for both parties involved. Therefore, I urge you to address this matter promptly to ensure the integrity of my account details. 
Please acknowledge receipt of this claim notice within [ 10 business days ] and confirm the corrective actions taken to rectify the billing address discrepancy.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 
Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXXEnclosure : Copy of Billing Statement Showing Discrepancy This claim notice will serve as a formal request for corrective action regarding the billing address discrepancy, and it provides clear instructions on the specific relief demanded.
